title: Peppery Irish Crumble Muffins
description: A sweet and savory muffin recipe that combines the spiciness of pepper with the warmth of Irish flavors. Perfect for a breakfast treat or a snack.
instructions: Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add the crumble and glucose to the dry ingredients and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, and milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups.
Sprinkle a pinch of crumble on top of each muffin.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the muffins are golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
Allow the muffins to cool in the tin for 5 minutes, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely.
